reviews.review_title: Exactly the type of app that is needed
reviews.review_description: You just added the classics (at least for Meta Quest) and it's great! Looking forward to the Impressionists. Have looked long and hard for museum-like experiences, so this is amazing. There seems to be an option in settings to choose English instead of Spanish, but it's unclickable for me. (Update: closed program and reopened and now it works to switch to English explanations - wonderful!) I also enjoy switching back to Spanish to practice my Spanish listening skills. After Impressionism, please feature more art! Maybe Michelangelo?

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your comments Korofam. We are very happy that you enjoyed the experience. We are looking forward to opening more exhibitions soon.

Regarding the problems you mention with the language configuration, we would be very grateful if you could provide us with further information at contacto@binaryboxstudios.com. Thank you very much in advance.
Thanks for your review Qipper. Yes, we want to launch more expositions in the near future :)
